mapper.select: SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.created_at, U.status, COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id

SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.created_at, U.status, COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}
